bead.title: Consolidate site skill pages into single ddx skill page
bead.description: Per FEAT-011, consolidate the 6 separate skill pages (/ddx-bead, /ddx-agent, /ddx-install, /ddx-status, /ddx-review, /ddx-run) on the website into a single ddx skill page mirroring SKILL.md + reference structure. If B15a finds FEAT-011 still in flight (skill not yet single in repo), update with currently-shipped reference subcommands and note the consolidation status. Do not block on FEAT-011 final landing — codex confirmed skill exists in repo trees.
bead.acceptance: 1. website/content/docs/skills.md or equivalent shows ONE ddx skill (not 6). 2. References subcommands as section headings if applicable. 3. cd website && hugo builds. 4. 'grep -c "## /ddx-" website/content/docs/skills.md' returns 0 (no per-skill subsection).
